message:
feat: Add E2E test infrastructure (TestLogger + CLI spawn wrapper)

Implements shared testing infrastructure for E2E tests:

- TestLogger class with log levels (debug/info/step/error)
- Timestamp and context formatting for all log entries
- File output support for CI artifact collection (JSON/text formats)
- Step counter for numbered test steps
- Timer support for measuring operation duration
- Error tracking with hasErrors() helper

- CLI spawn wrapper (spawnCli) with stdout/stderr capture
- Timeout support with AbortController
- Command timing and exit code logging
- spawnJfp helper for jfp CLI tests

This unblocks downstream E2E test development for both CLI and Web.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ms6","title":"Configure Cloudflare DNS for jeffreysprompts.com","description":"**Details:**
- Set up DNS records in Cloudflare
- Point domain to Vercel
- Configure SSL/TLS
- Enable caching and security features

**DNS Records:**
```
Type  Name    Content                   Proxy
CNAME @       cname.vercel-dns.com      Yes
CNAME www     cname.vercel-dns.com      Yes
```

**SSL/TLS Settings:**
- Mode: Full (strict)
- Always Use HTTPS: On
- Automatic HTTPS Rewrites: On
- HSTS: Enabled with long max-age

**Caching:**
- Browser Cache TTL: 4 hours
- Respect Existing Headers: Yes

**Security:**
- Bot Fight Mode: On
- Security Level: Medium

**Verification:**
- Add Vercel domain verification TXT record if required
- Test SSL certificate issuance

**Reasoning:** Cloudflare provides CDN, SSL, and DDoS protection. Proper DNS setup ensures reliable, secure access to jeffreysprompts.com.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:33:27.131701883-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T17:14:41.769783804-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T17:14:41.769783804-05:00","close_reason":"Site is live at jeffreysprompts.com - DNS configured with Cloudflare pointing to Vercel. SSL/TLS, caching, and security features active.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ms6","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-6xs","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:20.797846225-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r7k","title":"Implement core package unit tests (packages/core/__tests__)","description":"**Details:**
- Test prompt registry: getPrompt, getPromptsByCategory, getPromptsByTag
- Test BM25 search: relevance, boosting, synonym expansion
- Test template renderer: variable substitution, defaults, edge cases
- Test export functions: SKILL.md generation, markdown export, JSON payload
- Test bundle/workflow logic: getBundlePrompts, generateBundleSkillMd
- Test schema validation: valid prompts pass, invalid prompts fail with clear errors

**Framework:** Vitest with happy-dom

**Coverage Target:** 90%+ for all exported functions

**Test Organization:**
```
packages/core/__tests__/
  prompts/
    registry.test.ts
    types.test.ts (type guards)
  search/
    bm25.test.ts
    tokenize.test.ts
    synonyms.test.ts
  export/
    skills.test.ts
    markdown.test.ts
    json.test.ts
  template/
    render.test.ts
```

**Reasoning:** Core package is imported by both web and CLI - bugs here propagate everywhere. Comprehensive tests ensure registry integrity, search quality, and export correctness.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:06.647470174-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:15:14.842971466-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:15:14.842971466-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented core package unit tests: (1) Registry tests - prompts, categories, getPrompt, getPromptsByCategory/Tag, searchPromptsByText, (2) BM25 tests - buildIndex, search, boosting, (3) Tokenize tests - tokenize, tokenizeRaw, ngrams, STOPWORDS, (4) Export tests - generateSkillMd, generateInstallScript, generateSkillEntries, computeSkillHash, createManifestEntry. 73 tests pass.  {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rnm","title":"Implement useLocalStorage hook","description":"**Details:**
- Generic hook for localStorage persistence
- SSR-safe (handles hydration)
- Type-safe with generics
- Used by: basket, theme, variable inputs, preferences

**Implementation:**
```typescript
// apps/web/src/hooks/use-local-storage.ts
'use client';

export function useLocalStorage<T>(key: string, initialValue: T) {
  // State to store our value
  const [storedValue, setStoredValue] = useState<T>(() => {
    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return initialValue;
    try {
      const item = localStorage.getItem(key);
      return item ? JSON.parse(item) : initialValue;
    } catch {
      return initialValue;
    }
  });

  // Persist to localStorage on change
  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return;
    try {
      localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(storedValue));
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('Failed to save to localStorage:', error);
    }
  }, [key, storedValue]);

  return [storedValue, setStoredValue] as const;
}
```

**SSR Handling:**
- Initial render uses provided default
- useEffect syncs with localStorage after hydration
- Prevents hydration mismatch errors

**Location:** apps/web/src/hooks/use-local-storage.ts

**Reasoning:** Many features need persistent state (basket, theme, variable inputs). Centralizing localStorage logic in a hook ensures consistent behavior and SSR safety.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:35.714509321-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:44:46.164609393-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:44:46.164609393-05:00","close_reason":"Added apps/web/src/hooks/use-local-storage.ts SSR-safe localStorage hook"}

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+/**
+ * Testing utilities for JeffreysPrompts E2E tests
+ *
+ * Provides shared infrastructure for CLI and Web E2E testing with
+ * detailed structured logging for debugging.
+ */
+
+export { TestLogger, type LogLevel, type LogEntry, type TestLoggerOptions } from "./logger";
+export { spawnCli, type SpawnResult, type SpawnOptions } from "./spawn";
